instruction:
Out of 10 Go stones, there are 2 black stones and 8 white stones. If these 10 stones are randomly divided into two piles, each containing 5 stones, the probability that each pile contains one black stone is____.

Options:
A. 4/7
B. 5/12
C. 2/5
D. 6/11
E. 5/9
F. 1/2
G. 3/8
H. 7/10
I. 1/4
J. 9/14
